query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key takeaway:

**As of June–July 2026, there is no confirmed pending or newly-announced $10B+ acquisition by any Magnificent 7 company.**

The most important findings:

1. **Only one Mag-7 $10B+ deal in the era** — Google/Alphabet's **$32B acquisition of Wiz**, which *closed March 11, 2026* (announced back in March 2025). It's the largest deal in Alphabet's history.

2. **M&A drought despite record spending** — The Big Five hit a *decade low* in acquisitions (~12 deals YTD 2026) even while spending ~$650–725B on AI capex. Capital is going to infrastructure and minority stakes, not takeovers.

3. **Top rumored large deal: Apple–Perplexity** — The only live path to a new $10B+ Mag-7 deal. Apple abandoned its "net cash neutral" target (May 2, 2026), signaling M&A appetite, but *no formal offer had been made*. Would be Apple's biggest-ever acquisition.

4. **Nvidia–PC maker rumor was flatly denied** (April 2026) after spiking Dell/HP shares.

5. **Sub-$10B actual deals**: Apple–Q.ai (~$2B), Meta–Manus (~$2B, blocked by China), plus minority investments (Meta's $14.3B into Scale AI, Microsoft's ~30% OpenAI stake — neither is an acquisition).

The record $10B+ M&A wave of 2026 is dominated by *non-Mag-7* players (Netflix–Warner Bros. Discovery ~$83B, PIF/Silver Lake–EA ~$55B, Charter–Cox $34.5B).

Full synthesis and structured data (key facts, sources, quantitative data points) have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Google Completes $32 Billion Acquisition of Wiz
sources.snippet: The deal closed on March 11, 2026. Google's $32 billion acquisition of Wiz, Inc., a leading cloud security platform.

sources.title: Q2 2026 Building, Backing, and Buying AI
sources.snippet: Big Five acquisition deals dropped to a decade low — 7 in 2024, 14 in 2025, 12 YTD 2026. Meta invested $14.3B in Scale AI Series G; China ordered unwinding of Meta's $2B Manus acquisition April 2026.

sources.title: Apple Weighs Acquisition of Perplexity AI Startup
sources.snippet: Bloomberg reports Apple executives held internal discussions about bidding for Perplexity AI; talks at early stage and 'may not lead to an offer.'

sources.title: Apple hints it may be brewing a large AI acquisition
sources.snippet: Apple abandoned 'net cash neutral' target on May 2, 2026 earnings call; analysts see precursor to M&A. Q.ai acquired for ~$2B, 2nd-largest after Beats $3B.

sources.title: Nvidia Denies Rumors About Acquiring PC Maker; HP, Dell Stocks Still Spike
sources.snippet: 'The media report is false; NVIDIA is not engaged in discussions to acquire any PC maker,' the company said.

sources.title: Nvidia PC Acquisition Rumor: Dell Stock Surges 6.7% [2026]
sources.snippet: SemiAccurate April 13, 2026 report claimed Nvidia negotiating to acquire a large PC company; Dell surged 6.7%; Nvidia issued a flat denial.

sources.title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
sources.snippet: China's NDRC called for Meta to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus in April 2026.

sources.title: Big Tech's $2.7 trillion AI bill comes due: Chart of the Day
sources.snippet: Mag 7 plus Broadcom and Oracle lost ~$2.7 trillion in market value during June 2026; free cash flow projected to fall, squeezing buybacks, acquisitions, dividends.

sources.title: Major takeaways from Magnificent Seven's AI-fueled earnings
sources.snippet: Group bond issuance hit $134 billion YTD 2026 vs $87.5 billion all of 2025; Alphabet, Amazon, Meta driving debt sales to build data centers.

sources.title: Upcoming M&A Deals: Mergers and Acquisitions Tracker
sources.snippet: Pending deals: Netflix $83B Warner Bros Discovery, $55B PIF/Silver Lake bid for EA, Charter $34.5B Cox merger — none are Mag-7.

sources.title: Google, Microsoft, Meta, Amazon capex to hit $725 billion in 2026
sources.snippet: Combined Big Tech AI capex ~$725B in 2026 (Amazon ~$200B, Microsoft ~$190B, Alphabet $175-185B, Meta $115-135B), up 77% YoY.

sources.title: A Look at Trump's Major Tech Stock Buys
sources.snippet: July 1, 2026 disclosure; Apple announced $100B additional US investment; Nvidia/AMD 15% China chip-sales arrangement.

data_points.metric: Big Five acquisition deal count YTD 2026
Meta investment in Scale AI (Series G minority stake, not acquisition)
Mag 7 + Broadcom/Oracle market value lost in June 2026
Combined Big Tech 2026 AI capex guidance
Alphabet equity raise June 2026 (for infrastructure, not M&A)
Nvidia-PC maker acquisition rumor (denied by Nvidia)
